title: Luffy Challenges Kaido Again
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Nami, Unknown person #8, Luffy as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's in your hands now, Shinobu- San!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: nothing's changed. He's losing strength but still eager.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is the log father kept of his adventures.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He used to tell me stories, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For all we know, it could be "pirate Hunter" zero in there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ooh?! talk about hitting the jackpot! One big name carrying another!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it, Moss Head! You're always such a pain in my ass!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn! The objects we switched with were midair!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama, where are you!? I can save you now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where did you guys fall from?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only make a habit of catching ladies!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your timing is impeccable, black leg-ya. I'll leave him with you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold up! At least explain what's going on!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zoro-ya probably has 20 to 30 broken bones. Put him on his back and secure him with a splint. Make sure he's still conscious and breathing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Mom must be rampaging over there. Huff..Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm no doctor! and I don't have time for this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it, who put you in this sorry state anyway?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I guess you making it up there is nothing to sneeze at.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: seemed like he figured something out at the last moment...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 48 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
